description_long: This object depicts a humanoid figure with exaggerated, distorted proportions, featuring elongated arms and legs that curve and twist unnaturally. The figure wears a futuristic, high-collared jacket with a wide, angular shoulder design and intricate blue and orange detailing, paired with loose-fitting pants and athletic shoes. The arms are particularly unusual, appearing to extend and bend in a serpentine fashion, with one arm adorned by a large, metallic wrist device. The back of the figure is accentuated by two large, wing-like structures that jut out dramatically, adding to the surreal and avant-garde appearance. The face is human-like, with short, straight hair and a neutral expression. The overall design suggests a blend of urban fashion and science fiction elements, making the figure stand out in any urban environment.
description: A distorted humanoid figure in futuristic urban attire with elongated limbs, a high-collared jacket, and dramatic wing-like structures extending from the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face, high-collared jacket, and the full extent of the wide, angular shoulders and twisted arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme curvature of the left arm and leg, as well as the profile of the wing-like back structures.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full span of the wing-like extensions and the back of the jacket, with both arms and legs visible in their twisted forms.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the right arm's curvature, the side profile of the head, and the dramatic extension of the back structures.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic high-collared jacket with wide shoulders, loose pants, and athletic wear
